Description: Verifies PO exists in SAP system
Validation Logic: Calls SAP OData API to verify PO number exists and retrieves vendor/amount/date from SAP
Error Message Example: PO {poNumber} not found in SAP

Description: Verifies vendor name matches between PO and SAP
Validation Logic: Compares vendor from PO with vendor returned from SAP
Error Message Example: Vendor mismatch: PO has '{poVendor}', SAP has '{sapVendor}'

Description: Invoice total must match Cost Summary total within ±2%
Validation Logic: Calculates percentage difference between invoice total and cost summary total
Error Message Example: Invoice total and Cost Summary total differ by {percentage}% (tolerance: ±2%)

Description: All PO line items must appear in Invoice
Validation Logic: Checks that all PO item codes exist in Invoice line items
Error Message Example: Missing {count} PO line items in Invoice: {itemCodes}

Description: PO document must be present
Validation Logic: Checks if at least one PO document exists in package
Error Message Example: Missing required items: PO

Description: Invoice document must be present
Validation Logic: Checks if at least one Invoice document exists in package
Error Message Example: Missing required items: Invoice

Description: Cost Summary document must be present
Validation Logic: Checks if at least one Cost Summary document exists in package
Error Message Example: Missing required items: CostSummary

Description: At least 1 photo must be present
Validation Logic: Checks if at least one Photo document exists in package
Error Message Example: Missing required items: Photos (at least 1 required)

Description: Invoice date must be >= PO date
Validation Logic: Compares invoice date with PO date
Error Message Example: Invoice date ({invoiceDate}) is before PO date ({poDate})

Description: Invoice date must be <= Submission date
Validation Logic: Compares invoice date with package creation date
Error Message Example: Invoice date ({invoiceDate}) is after submission date ({submissionDate})

Description: Vendor names must match across PO and Invoice
Validation Logic: Normalizes and compares vendor names (case-insensitive)
Error Message Example: Vendor names do not match across documents

Description: Agency Name must be present
Validation Logic: Checks if AgencyName field is not null/empty
Error Message Example: Missing required fields: Agency Name

Description: Agency Address must be present
Validation Logic: Checks if AgencyAddress field is not null/empty
Error Message Example: Missing required fields: Agency Address

Description: Billing Name must be present
Validation Logic: Checks if BillingName field is not null/empty
Error Message Example: Missing required fields: Billing Name

Description: Billing Address must be present
Validation Logic: Checks if BillingAddress field is not null/empty
Error Message Example: Missing required fields: Billing Address

Description: Either State Name or State Code must be present
Validation Logic: Checks if StateName OR StateCode is not null/empty
Error Message Example: Missing required fields: State Name/Code

Description: Invoice Number must be present
Validation Logic: Checks if InvoiceNumber field is not null/empty
Error Message Example: Missing required fields: Invoice Number

Description: Invoice Date must be present
Validation Logic: Checks if InvoiceDate is not default date
Error Message Example: Missing required fields: Invoice Date

Description: Vendor Code must be present
Validation Logic: Checks if VendorCode field is not null/empty
Error Message Example: Missing required fields: Vendor Code

Description: GST Number must be present
Validation Logic: Checks if GSTNumber field is not null/empty
Error Message Example: Missing required fields: GST Number

Description: GST Percentage must be > 0
Validation Logic: Checks if GSTPercentage is greater than 0
Error Message Example: Missing required fields: GST Percentage

Description: HSN/SAC Code must be present
Validation Logic: Checks if HSNSACCode field is not null/empty
Error Message Example: Missing required fields: HSN/SAC Code

Description: Invoice Amount must be > 0
Validation Logic: Checks if TotalAmount is greater than 0
Error Message Example: Missing required fields: Invoice Amount

Description: Agency Code must match between Invoice and PO
Validation Logic: Compares AgencyCode fields (case-insensitive)
Error Message Example: Agency Code mismatch: Invoice has '{invoiceCode}', PO has '{poCode}'

Description: PO Number in Invoice must match PO document
Validation Logic: Compares PONumber in Invoice with PO document
Error Message Example: PO Number mismatch: Invoice references '{invoicePoNumber}', but PO is '{poNumber}'

Description: Vendor Code must match between Invoice and PO
Validation Logic: Compares VendorCode fields (case-insensitive)
Error Message Example: Vendor Code mismatch: Invoice has '{invoiceCode}', PO has '{poCode}'

Description: Campaign Name must be present
Validation Logic: Checks if CampaignName field is not null/empty
Error Message Example: Missing required fields: Campaign Name

Description: State must be present
Validation Logic: Checks if State field is not null/empty
Error Message Example: Missing required fields: State

Description: Campaign Start Date must be present
Validation Logic: Checks if CampaignStartDate is not default date
Error Message Example: Missing required fields: Campaign Start Date

Description: Campaign End Date must be present
Validation Logic: Checks if CampaignEndDate is not default date
Error Message Example: Missing required fields: Campaign End Date

Description: Total Cost must be > 0
Validation Logic: Checks if TotalCost is greater than 0
Error Message Example: Missing required fields: Total Cost

Description: At least one cost breakdown must be present
Validation Logic: Checks if CostBreakdowns list has at least one item
Error Message Example: Missing required fields: Cost Breakdowns

Description: Invoice date must fall within campaign date range
Validation Logic: Checks if InvoiceDate is between CampaignStartDate and CampaignEndDate
Error Message Example: Invoice date ({invoiceDate}) is outside campaign period ({startDate} to {endDate})

Description: State must match between Cost Summary and Invoice
Validation Logic: Compares State fields (case-insensitive)
Error Message Example: State mismatch: Cost Summary has '{costSummaryState}', Invoice has '{invoiceState}'

Description: Cost Summary total must match Invoice total within ±2%
Validation Logic: Same as validation #3 (duplicate check)
Error Message Example: Cost Summary total and Invoice total differ by {percentage}%

Description: Activity Type must be present
Validation Logic: Checks if ActivityType field is not null/empty
Error Message Example: Missing required fields: Activity Type

Description: Location must be present
Validation Logic: Checks if Location field is not null/empty
Error Message Example: Missing required fields: Location

Description: Activity Date must be present
Validation Logic: Checks if ActivityDate is not default date
Error Message Example: Missing required fields: Activity Date

Description: Activity date must fall within campaign date range
Validation Logic: Checks if ActivityDate is between CampaignStartDate and CampaignEndDate
Error Message Example: Activity date ({activityDate}) is outside campaign period ({startDate} to {endDate})

Description: Activity location must match Cost Summary state
Validation Logic: Compares Location with State (case-insensitive)
Error Message Example: Location mismatch: Activity location is '{activityLocation}', but Cost Summary state is '{costSummaryState}'

Description: Photo must have EXIF timestamp
Validation Logic: Checks if Timestamp field is not null
Error Message Example: Date present on {count} out of {total} photos

Description: Photo must have GPS coordinates (Latitude/Longitude)
Validation Logic: Checks if Latitude and Longitude are not null
Error Message Example: Location coordinates present on {count} out of {total} photos

Description: Photo must contain person wearing blue t-shirt
Validation Logic: Uses AI vision to detect person in blue t-shirt
Error Message Example: No photos with person in blue t-shirt detected (AI validation)

Description: Photo must contain Bajaj vehicle
Validation Logic: Uses AI vision to detect Bajaj vehicle in photo
Error Message Example: No photos with Bajaj vehicle detected (AI validation)

Description: Number of photos must match activity requirements
Validation Logic: Checks if photo count meets minimum requirements for activity type
Error Message Example: Insufficient photos: {count} photos provided, but {required} required for this activity type

Description: Photo timestamp must fall within campaign date range
Validation Logic: Checks if photo Timestamp is between CampaignStartDate and CampaignEndDate
Error Message Example: Photo timestamp ({photoDate}) is outside campaign period ({startDate} to {endDate})
